Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}So... I think I mostly get what's goin' on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}That's... what happens to the losers, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}And no one's taking my sister's key... no matter who we have to beat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}That's what I expected from li'l sis, but... Aigis, what about you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}You wanna redo the past, or move forward?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Huh... Well, I didn't exactly make a choice myself, but I've been thinking...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}The past or the present... I dunno, I feel like that's the wrong way to look at it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}And maybe... Maybe the problem's us for seein' it that way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I mean, just look at us! Beatin' each other down 'cause we can't agree.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Do we really got what it takes to go back and make an even better future?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}What if we end up makin' a worse future instead?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Look, I get that we don't got much time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}But if we rush this fightin' each other, no question we're gettin' a worse future.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}So, this is my choice, and I'm standin' by it all the way...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}If we gotta fight anyway, then I'll just knock some sense into all of ya! That's the best I got.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Heh... If he was here... I bet he'd know what to do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Sorry, Aigis, but you can't be the one movin' on to the finals if you don't even know what you wanna do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}So I gotta do it myself, no matter how tough it gets.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Alright, I'm ready! Let's get this show on the road![n]{f 1 1}
